Community Forum Search

Replay Drift After HTML Change

A user reports that the replay stage changed after a docs site updated its hero block.

Troubleshooting

Compare stage hashes first. If only reduce changed, the issue is usually harmless layout churn.

If pack changed too, inspect proof records by chunk id and confirm selector stability.

Resolution

The team pinned a new reduce rule and replay became deterministic again on the next run.

Trending posts and ads.
